title: Dr. Beckmann Carpet Stain Remover | Works in 3 mins | 650 ml
features: Unique carpet stain remover brush for residue-free carpet cleaning - kind on colours and textiles
Eliminates road and pet grime, and a variety of stains e.g. red wine, grease and coffee from carpets and rugs - including wool carpets
Special ingredients combat odours - vital for dirt and stains caused by pets e.g. vomit or excrement
Powerful cleaning formula with active oxygen and organic alcohol - Easy-to-use applicator brush ensures optimal results
How to use: Turn the bottle upside down to moisten the applicator sponge. Apply product, gently rub into the area and leave to work. Dab up any residues with a damp cloth
description: Product Description If it spills, it can stain! Carpet-cleaning is pretty much part of daily business. Stubborn stains like red wine, coffee or mud are often difficult to get out of carpets and can also cause unpleasant odours if left untreated. With its powerful oxy-powered formula and 2 in 1 built-in brush, the Dr. Beckmann Carpet Stain Remover effectively removes heavy soil and unsightly spills. The 2 in 1 brush gets deep into the stain, removing dirt from deep in the fibres, while also eliminating and neutralising unpleasant odours. All whilte being gentle to colours and fibres including wool carpets/rugs. Ideal for: -Cola -Grease -Coffee -Makeup -Oil -Red wine -Juice -Mud/dirt -Tea Not suitable for: Velvet Silk Water-sensitive fabrics DIRECTIONS FOR USE: 1. Open bottle, pierce 2mm hole in seal. Screw brush back on. 2. Remove loose surface dirt. 3. Apply, work lightly into the fabric. Do not soak. 4. Let work for 3 minutes. 5. Dab off the product and residual stain completely with a damp light-coloured cloth. Rinse brush after use. Important information: - ALWAYS TEST FOR COLOURFASTNESS/FIBRE COMPATIBILITY prior to use by applying a small amount of the product to an inconspicuous area of the carpet/upholstery or o-cut, if available, and then leave for 30 minutes. - Remove all residues of the product using a damp white cloth and allow the test area to dry completely. If the test area remains unchanged (e.g. no change in colour or evidence of colour bleed), then proceed with stain removal. - Always follow care label instructions for carpet or upholstery. Do not over saturate stained area as this could lead to fibre damage. - Do not use on leather, suede, silk, velvet or any fabric which can be damaged by water alone. - Certain stains can cause permanent discolouration which cannot be treated Ingredients Contains among other ingredients: Less than 5% Anionic and Non-Ionic Surfactants, Oxygen-based Bleaching Agents, Perfumes, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains 1 X Dr Beck Manufacturer Contact Information ACDOCO, Manchester, M44 5AX. See more
